atomic_facts.fact: A large crowd of people is gathered in an outdoor plaza.
Many individuals in the crowd are holding up signs and placards.
A large brick building with a white dome is visible in the background.
The text 'Trump shrinks national monuments' is displayed on screen.
The 'VICE News Tonight' and 'HBO' logos are visible in the top right corner.
Mountains are visible in the far background behind the crowd.
